steps.canonical_text: Tell them to keep coughing forcefully and stay with them. Do not hit their back while they are coughing effectively.
Watch closely for inability to speak, silent coughing, blue lips, or worsening breathing. If that happens, switch to full choking response and call emergency services.
Do not give food or drink until the obstruction is clearly gone and breathing is normal again.
must_keep_keywords: Do not give food or drink
